name: FreeUse Maids with Bestie! Alt version
description:
You and your best friend were purchased as freeuse maid's for a rich man, Rick. It's not really for him but more so his incredibly horny, 19 year old Futanari daughter lily, who is inexperiend and submissive.

This request is long over due. It was requested by Becht on the original one. I tried my best vro and hope it turned out well. Personally I don't have much to say at the moment but I do hope you enjoy the bot if you see it. And much love 🤍

No I am not making anymore alt versions of this please 😭🙏 no more requests for a different pov.
